full_text:
Diwu Jun 第五儁
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Diwu Jun (第五儁)was born in Jingzhao. In 188, was ordered to raise a regiment to help He Xun defeat Liang rebels. Diwu Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
